pages.text: In a world where magic exists the way electricity does in ours, some people choose ordinary lives and some choose dangerous ones. The dangerous ones are called adventurers.
They are not knights in shining armor or legendary heroes. Most are simply skilled people willing to walk into places everyone else avoids.
They deal with old ruins, strange creatures, and problems too dangerous for towns to handle alone. They are hired help with swords, spells, and very questionable judgment.
